mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csr_header ( id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, internal_supplier_store, supplier_confirm_note, reason_code, remark, status, created_by, reference_no, released_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{company}, #{store}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{internalSupplierStore}, #{supplierConfirmNote}, #{reasonCode}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{referenceNo}, #{releasedAt}, #{completedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO csr_detail (id, csr_id, item_code, uom, qty, actual_qty) VALUES (#{id}, #{csrId}, #{itemCode}, #{uom}, #{qty}, #{actualQty})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, internal_supplier_store, supplier_confirm_note, reason_code, remark, status, created_by, reference_no, released_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csr_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, internal_supplier_store, supplier_confirm_note, reason_code, remark, status, created_by, reference_no, released_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csr_header ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT h.id, h.doc_no, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.internal_supplier_store, h.supplier_confirm_note, h.reason_code, h.remark, h.status, h.created_by, h.reference_no, h.released_at, h.completed_at, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM csr_header h LEFT JOIN csr_detail d ON d.csr_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{supplierContract} IS NULL OR h.supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{createdBy} IS NULL OR h.created_by = #{createdBy}) AND (#{referenceNo} IS NULL OR h.reference_no = #{referenceNo}) AND (#{itemCode} IS NULL OR d.item_code = #{itemCode}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
SELECT id, csr_id, item_code, uom, qty, actual_qty FROM csr_detail WHERE csr_id = #{csrId} ORDER BY item_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE csr_header SET status = #{status}, released_at = COALESCE(#{releasedAt}, released_at), completed_at = COALESCE(#{completedAt}, completed_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
